zh.lifeSummary: 當Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III於1155年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格時，他的母親Irmgard24歲，父親Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde25歲。他於1181年與Sophie Valdemarsdatter在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1206年在德國賀林根阿爾騰包格 藍德阿爾騰包格享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III于1155年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格时，他的母亲Irmgard24岁，父亲Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde25岁。他于1181年与Sophie Valdemarsdatter在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1206年在德国賀林根阿爾騰包格 藍德阿爾騰包格享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Weimar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Hans, Kurt, Reinhard.
habitational name from any of several places called Weimar in Hesse and Thuringia.

variants.name: Weimer
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wini ‘friend’ + mār ‘famous’ or from another, composed of the elements wīg ‘battle, fight’ + mār ‘famous’.

variants.name: Waymer
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Weimar   or   Weimer  .

nameMeanings.name: Siegfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III was born in 1155, in Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany, his mother, Irmgard, was 24 and his father, Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde, was 25. He married Sophie Valdemarsdatter in 1181, in Schleswig-Holstein, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1206, in Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thuringia, Germany, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III est né en 1155, à Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne, sa mère, Irmgard, avait 24 ans et son père, Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Sophie Valdemarsdatter en 1181, à Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1206, à Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III 1155 in Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Irmgard 24 und sein Vater Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde 25. Er hat 1181 in Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland Sophie Valdemarsdatter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1206 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III è nato il nel 1155 nel Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania, il suo madre, Irmgard, aveva 24 anni e il suo padre, Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Sophie Valdemarsdatter nel 1181, nel Schleswig-Holstein, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1206, nel Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Germania, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde IIIが1155年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ブランデンブルグで生まれた時，母Irmgardは24歳，父Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamündeは25歳であった。1181年にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインでSophie Valdemarsdatterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1206年にドイツスuリンジェンアルテンブルジャー ランドアルテンブルグで51歳で死去した。

ko.Biburg, Augsburg: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 오그스버그 디도르프 비버그
ko.lifeSummary: Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III(이)가 1155년 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 브랜덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Irmgard(은)는 24세였고, 그의 아버지 Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1181년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인에서 Sophie Valdemarsdatter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1206년 독일 스u링 알텐버거 랜드 알텐버그에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III nasceu em 1155, em Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha, sua mãe, Irmgard, tinha 24 anos e seu pai, Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Sophie Valdemarsdatter em 1181, em Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1206, em Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Alemanha, com 51 anos.

ru.Biburg, Augsburg: бибург, диедорф, ландкрис аугсбург, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Siegfried von Weimar Orlamünde III родился в 1155 г. в местности провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия, его матери по имени Irmgard было 24 года, а отцу, которого звали Hermann I. Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophie Valdemarsdatter в 1181 г. в местности щлесвиг-холстин, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1206 г. в местности алтенбург, алтенбургир ланд, тuринген, Германия в возрасте 51 год.

Graf von Weimar-Orlamünde, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sophie Valdemarsdatter en 1181, en Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1206, en Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Alemania, a la edad de 51 años.
